definition.title: One Home: Resort on the Road
definition.objective: Position LineHaul Station as a nationwide living network for drivers through the One Home program. Build 'Resort on the Road' as THE dominant content pillar. Feed creative into GA #1 ad campaign for testing. Must feel premium, aspirational, not pitchy. Communicate lifestyle upgrade, financial advantage, and network concept.
definition.target_audience: Truck drivers (primary — lifestyle aspiration + dignity), young/prospective drivers (mentorship track, entrepreneurial mindset), trucker families, carriers evaluating driver retention, minimalist lifestyle drivers
definition.cadence: ACTIVE NOW. First batch of lifestyle videos in production. GA #1 ad test imminent. Jeff viral short scripting next. Sleeper Makeover sub-concept in development.

next_actions: Continue active video production (Ad Version + Jeff Swenson Explainer)
Complete One Home logo and sub-brand design (Jeff + Mark)
Receive new high-fidelity renderings from Architect Ron
Build One Home Lifestyle Calculator landing page
Develop Sleeper Makeover program concept under One Home umbrella
Mine ad copy scripts for static post content and social captions
Test rendering filter processing for more lifelike imagery
Language audit: replace all instances of 'home base' with 'Home Hub'

campaign_card.target_audience: Truck drivers (primary — lifestyle aspiration + dignity), young/prospective drivers (mentorship + entrepreneurial mindset), trucker families, carriers evaluating driver retention, minimalist lifestyle drivers
campaign_card.campaign_name: One Home: Resort on the Road
key_messages: One Home — a nationwide living network for drivers. Choose your Home Hub, and the entire LineHaul Station network becomes your home.
$13/day when you use it. Pay only for the days you need — no mortgage, no interest, no wasted rent on empty apartments.
Your sleeper is your bedroom. LineHaul is your home. Same comfort, same amenities, same experience — nationwide.

cta.lead_capture_point: One Home Lifestyle Calculator landing page → membership registration

creative_assets: Video: Commercial Ad Version (Artlist footage + renderings) — IN PRODUCTION
Video: Jeff Swenson Explainer Version (direct-to-camera) — IN PRODUCTION
Scripts: 4 Sora2 character video prompts (Young Builder, Reinvention Story, Minimalist, Young Woman Builder) — WRITTEN
Scripts: 2 x 12-second 'New Kind of Listing' Sora prompts — WRITTEN
Scripts: 5 voiceover styles (Driver, Younger Mentor, Calm Explainer, plus 2 additional) — WRITTEN
Images: New high-fidelity renderings from Architect Ron — PENDING
Landing Page: One Home Lifestyle Calculator — PLANNED
Sub-concept: Sleeper Makeover program — IN DEVELOPMENT

initiatives: Long-form ads (Year of the Trucker format)
Sora2 AI-generated lifestyle character videos (4 scripts ready)
Viral shorts (Jeff mentorship — 'If I Was 18 Again', 'You're Not Lost', 'Your First Business')
Financial math graphics ($13/day vs $50 apartment vs $110 hotel vs $65 truck stop)
GA #1 ad campaign feed and testing
One Home Lifestyle Calculator (web interactive tool)
Podcast concept: The Trucking Blueprint / CDL Playbook
Rendering enhancement (AI filter processing for lifelike imagery)

_legacy_card.description: CONTENT ACTIVE. Dominant content pillar. One Home is a nationwide living network for drivers — choose a Home Hub, and the entire LineHaul Station network becomes home. Same comfort, same amenities, same experience at every location. The only things tied to Home Hub: mailbox, personal vehicle parking, storage unit. Everything else is identical everywhere. Drivers pay only for the days they use, starting as low as 60 days/year and growing in any increment up to 365. No mortgage, no interest, fully refundable membership. Sleeper Makeover sub-concept brings bedroom customization (mattress, linens, pillows, decor, audio/video) under the One Home umbrella.
_legacy_card.strategic_purpose: Build 'Resort on the Road' and 'One Home' as THE dominant content pillar. Feed creative into GA #1 ad campaign for testing. Aspirational lifestyle positioning — premium, not pitchy. Communicate: lifestyle upgrade, financial advantage, network concept, flexible membership model. Position LHS as a nationwide resort-style living system for drivers.
_legacy_card.asset_links:
DECKS & PRESENTATIONS:
- Digital brochure (IN DEVELOPMENT) — One Home concept explainer, Home Hub system, nationwide network, lifestyle amenities, membership flexibility, financial comparison vs traditional housing. Branding: luxury apartment community aesthetic. Logo work underway (Jeff + Mark).

VIDEOS:
- Video 1: Commercial Ad Version (IN PRODUCTION) — Artlist footage + LHS renderings. Story: driver discovers 'One Home' listing on home search site. Transitions to commercial showing drivers at LHS locations, amenities, renderings. For social ads, paid campaigns, landing page.
- Video 2: Jeff Swenson Explainer (IN PRODUCTION) — Direct-to-camera. Jeff explains One Home concept, Home Hub, flexible membership, lifestyle benefits. For website, social clips, educational content.
- Sora2 Character Videos (SCRIPTS WRITTEN, 4 characters): The Young Builder (24M, skipped apartment, bought truck), The Reinvention Story (41M, left corporate, found peace), The Minimalist (32M, sold everything), The Young Woman Builder (23F, chose asset over apartment).
- 12-Second Sora Prompt: 'New Kind of Listing' — driver in sleeper cab discovers new listing type on phone. Two versions written.
- Voiceover Scripts (5 STYLES WRITTEN): The Driver (real, honest), Younger Mentor (conversational advice), Calm Practical Explainer, plus 2 additional styles.

IMAGES / STATICS:
- Original architectural renderings (AVAILABLE)
- Rendering enhancement experiments (filter processing for lifelike look — SOME SUCCESS)
- New high-fidelity renderings from Architect Ron (PENDING — updated One Home concept)

SCRIPTS:
- Jeff Swenson One Home positioning (recorded in campaign briefing)
- Earlier Artlist video scripts (available for repurposing)
- 10 Sora2 video prompts: lifestyle testimonials ready to generate
- Viral short scripts: 'If I Was 18 Again', 'You're Not Lost', 'Your First Business'
- Podcast concept: The Trucking Blueprint / CDL Playbook

WEB / LANDING PAGE:
- One Home Lifestyle Calculator (PLANNED) — interactive tool. User enters income, apartment cost, utilities, taxes. Compares to One Home membership. Lead capture form below. Purpose: education, conversion, driver lead generation.

SLEEPER MAKEOVER PROGRAM:
- Sub-concept under One Home umbrella. Customization services: mattress, mattress topper, linens, pillows, wall decor, audio, video. Available at any LHS location. Reinforces 'your sleeper is your bedroom' messaging.
_legacy_card.pre_approved_angles: One Home nationwide living network. Home Hub (NOT 'home base'). Resort on the Road. The Rig Carlton. $13/day financial comparison ($13 vs $50 apartment vs $110 hotel vs $65 truck stop). Pay only for days you use. Flexible membership growth (60 → 120 → 200 → 365 days). No mortgage, no interest. Fully refundable membership. Young driver entrepreneurship (skip the apartment, buy a truck). Reinvention / career change narrative. Minimalist lifestyle (sold everything). Sleeper Makeover. AI-generated resort experience visuals. 'Wherever the road takes you, you're already home.'
_legacy_card.artlist_cost: Sora2 prompts for AI character videos (4 scripts written). Long-form ad production ongoing (Artlist footage + renderings). Viral shorts need Jeff filming time. New renderings pending from Architect Ron. Logo/branding design work underway.
_legacy_card.repurposing: Long-form ads → social clips, reels, story cuts. Sora2 character videos → individual platform posts (Instagram reels, LinkedIn stories, Facebook video). Financial math → static graphics, carousel breakdowns. Voiceover scripts → audio snippets, caption copy, quote graphics. Jeff explainer → educational clips, podcast seed content. Rendering imagery → static posts, carousel tours, story backgrounds. Lifestyle Calculator → screenshot walkthroughs, before/after financial comparisons. Sleeper Makeover → before/after content, product showcase posts.
_legacy_card.timeline: ACTIVE NOW. Commercial ad version and Jeff explainer in production. Sora2 character scripts written and ready to generate. New renderings pending from Architect Ron. Logo/branding work underway. Lifestyle Calculator landing page planned. Sleeper Makeover concept in development.
_legacy_card.language_rules: ALWAYS use 'Home Hub' — NEVER use 'home base' or 'base' (sounds military/operational). The term is personal and network-oriented. Example: 'Choose your Home Hub — and the entire LineHaul Station network becomes your home.' Other approved terms: One Home, Home Hub, Home Address, Home Port, Home Location, Home Station.
